_meta.description: Occupancy section registered input nodes. These user-editable values define the building's occupancy parameters used throughout ventilation, internal gains, and per-capita calculations. The totalHours input provides the annual hours for time-based ventilation calculations.

instances.label: Number of Occupants
instances.note: User-entered number of building occupants. If 0, occupancy.calculatedOccupants derives from occupancy density and floor area.

instances.label: Occupant Density
instances.note: Floor area per occupant. Used in calculatedOccupants when d_63 = 0.

instances.label: Occupied Hours per Day
instances.note: Daily occupied hours. Multiplied by 365 to get annual occupied hours (i_63).

instances.label: Total Annual Hours
instances.note: Total hours in a year. Used as divisor in ventilation rate calculations and annual energy conversions. Default 8760 = 365 × 24.

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInput in OccupancyNodes.js)
signature.output: Values stored in MultiModelState, consumed by ventilation, internal gains, and per-capita calculations

preconditions.description: Floor area per person must be non-negative

invariants.description: Typically constant at 365 × 24 hours per year
Cannot exceed hours in a day

behavior.output: Triggers recomputation of per-capita metrics, ventilation rates, internal gains
Triggers recomputation of annual occupied hours (i_63 = g_63 × 365)
Triggers recomputation of ventilation volumetric rate and energy calculations
behavior.note: G-classified, affects ventilation rate calculations. Typically remains at 8760.

edgeCases.handling: Accepted as-is, used in ventilation calculations
edgeCases.rationale: Allows for partial-year analysis if needed
